alperen sengun.detail: Played 38 minutes, posted 17 points and 11 rebounds in Game 6 loss.

amen thompson.detail: Played 45 minutes; recorded 3 assists versus the over of 4.
amen thompson.web_narrative: Thompson played 45 minutes but finished with only 3 assists, falling short of the 4-assist over. No injury or external factor explains the miss; he simply did not accumulate enough assists on the night.

ausar thompson.detail: Played 37 minutes with no flagged issues; no external sources available.

austin reaves.detail: Started and played 31 minutes in Game 6 win over the Rockets.

brandon ingram.detail: Did not start Game 6; listed as questionable pre-game and Jamal Shead started in his place, indicating Ingram did not play.

cade cunningham.detail: Played 42 minutes, posted 32 points and 10 rebounds in Game 6 victory.

desmond bane.detail: Played 38 minutes with no flagged issues; no external sources available.

donovan mitchell.detail: Played 41 minutes with no flagged issues; no external sources available.

evan mobley.detail: Played 41 minutes, posted 26 points and 14 rebounds in overtime loss.

jabari smith jr..detail: Left the game due to a left ankle injury per NBA.com.
jabari smith jr..web_narrative: Smith Jr. exited the game with a left ankle injury, which limited his opportunities and contributed to him going 1-of-multiple on three-point attempts, falling short of the 3PM over of 2.

jalen duren.detail: Left the game with a hand injury and did not return until 8:19 remaining in the fourth quarter.

james harden.detail: Played 44 minutes in overtime; went 1-4 from three, finishing with 1 three-pointer versus the over of 2.
james harden.web_narrative: Harden played the full 44 minutes including overtime but shot just 1-of-4 from three-point range, finishing with 1 made three-pointer and falling short of the over. No injury or external factor explains the miss; he simply shot poorly from deep.

paolo banchero.detail: Played 41 minutes but shot 4-of-20 from the field including 0-of-9 from three in Game 6 loss.

rj barrett.detail: Played 43 minutes, posted 24 points in overtime win over the Cavaliers.

scottie barnes.detail: Played 48 minutes (overtime), posted 25 points and 14 assists in Game 6 win.
